- Adjusts the host resolution to match t: - Adjusts the host resolution to match the client resolution when the display device is configured on Sunshine.
- Choose 5.1 or 7.1 surround sound for h: - Choose 5.1 or 7.1 surround sound for home-theater systems or use Stereo for general audio compatibility.
- Choose Auto to follow your TV locale,: - Choose Auto to follow your TV locale, or select a language manually.
- Enable for ultra low latency with game: - Enable for ultra low latency with game mode or disable for low latency with post-processing video enhancements.
- Find out if a new application update i: - Find out if a new application update is available.
- HDR requires an HDR10-capable device,: - HDR requires an HDR10-capable device, a GPU that can encode HEVC Main 10, and HDR10-enabled game.
- Higher FPS can reduce latency on high-: - Higher FPS can reduce latency on high-end devices, but may cause lag or instability on unsupported devices.
- If you encounter issues, here you can: - If you encounter issues, here you can restart the app to resolve them.
- Increase for better image quality or d: - Increase for better image quality or decrease to improve performance on slower connections.
- Increase for better video compression: - Increase for better video compression and quality or decrease to improve performance on lower-end devices.
- Increase for smoother video stream or: - Increase for smoother video stream or decrease for better performance on lower-end devices.
- Increase to improve image clarity or d: - Increase to improve image clarity or decrease for better performance on lower-end devices and slower networks.
- Recommended for devices that have issu: - Recommended for devices that have issues with the TV keyboard when entering the host IP address.
- Sorts the list of host apps from ascen: - Sorts the list of host apps from ascending order (A to Z) to descending order (Z to A) based on their titles.
- This can help reduce delays by keeping: - This can help reduce delays by keeping audio in sync for a consistent sound while streaming.
- This can help reduce micro-stutter by: - This can help reduce micro-stutter by delaying frames that arrive too early while streaming.
- This will cause loss of detail in ligh: - This will cause loss of detail in light and dark areas if your device doesn't properly display full range video content.
- Useful for users who need guidance or: - Useful for users who need guidance or help navigating the app.
